item.title: Put me down for cardio 😉 Perttu T. T. Laakso, Francisco B. Or...

View on Instagram


Put me down for cardio 😉 Perttu T. T. Laakso, Francisco B. Ortega, Pertti Huotari, Asko J. Tolvanen, Urho M. Kujala, Timo T. Jaakkola. Adolescent Cardiorespiratory Fitness and Future Work Ability. JAMA Network Open, 2024; 7 (3): e243861 DOI: 10.1001/jamanetworkopen.2024.3861#Fitness #Workaholic

item.title: Recycling ♻️ is always the cool thing 😎 stay green stay g...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Recycling ♻️ is always the cool thing 😎 stay green stay gold love yall Sewon Oh, Hanning Jiang, Liat H. Kugelmass, Erin E. Stache. Recycling of Post-Consumer Waste Polystyrene Using Commercial Plastic Additives. ACS Central Science, 2024; DOI: 10.1021/acscentsci.4c01317#Recycle #Green

item.title: The power of touch on ur game 🏀 Take me courtside so I can te...
item.description:
View on Instagram


The power of touch on ur game 🏀 Take me courtside so I can test this theory further plz 😈🔥😂Christiane M. Büttner, Christoph Kenntemich, Kipling D. Williams. The power of human touch: Physical contact improves performance in basketball free throws. Psychology of Sport and Exercise, 2024; 72: 102610 DOI: 10.1016/j.psychsport.2024.102610#Basketball #FreeThrow

item.title: See how I’m forming new habits while breaking bad ones? Very m...
item.description:
View on Instagram


See how I’m forming new habits while breaking bad ones? Very mindful, very goal-oriented. Eike K. Buabang, Kelly R. Donegan, Parnian Rafei, Claire M. Gillan. Leveraging cognitive neuroscience for making and breaking real-world habits. Trends in Cognitive Sciences, 2024; DOI: 10.1016/j.tics.2024.10.006#Neuroscience #Habits

item.title: Where my hug at 👀 😝Julian Packheiser, Helena Hartmann, Kel...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Where my hug at 👀 😝Julian Packheiser, Helena Hartmann, Kelly Fredriksen, Valeria Gazzola, Christian Keysers, Frédéric Michon. A systematic review and multivariate meta-analysis of the physical and mental health benefits of touch interventions. Nature Human Behaviour, 2024; DOI: 10.1038/s41562-024-01841-8#LoveLanguage #Touch

item.title: Put that phone down when you’re with your partner! I promise i...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Put that phone down when you’re with your partner! I promise it’ll improve their world 💜Siqi Wang, Yasin Rofcanin, Mireia Las Heras, Zeynep Yalabik. The more you connect, the less you connect: An examination of the role of phubbing at home and job crafting in the crossover and spillover effects of work–family spousal support on employee creativity. Journal of Occupational and Organizational Psychology, 2024; DOI: 10.1111/joop.12503#LoveLanguage #QualityTime

item.title: We normally think of ceramics as Hard ☕️ but it’s the Soft...
item.description:
View on Instagram


We normally think of ceramics as Hard ☕️ but it’s the Soft ones that have that smarter edge….Watch this 👀 Miriam Filippi, Aiste Balciunaite, Antonia Georgopoulou, Pablo Paniagua, Felix Drescher, Minghao Nie, Shoji Takeuchi, Frank Clemens, Robert K. Katzschmann. Sensor‐Embedded Muscle for Closed‐Loop Controllable Actuation in Proprioceptive Biohybrid Robots. Advanced Intelligent Systems, 2024; DOI: 10.1002/aisy.202400413#Prosthetics #Tech

item.title: Do you choose instant rewards or wait for something better? 🤔...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Do you choose instant rewards or wait for something better? 🤔 Your choice might depend on what you see first! 💸 Fadong Chen, Jiehui Zheng, Lei Wang, Ian Krajbich. Attribute latencies causally shape intertemporal decisions. Nature Communications, 2024; 15 (1) DOI: 10.1038/s41467-024-46657-2#Psychology #Goals

item.title: Could your genes decide how much you drink? UC San Diego’s lat...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Could your genes decide how much you drink? UC San Diego’s latest study says yes. Mariela V. Jennings, José Jaime Martínez-Magaña, Natasia S. Courchesne-Krak, Renata B. Cupertino, Laura Vilar-Ribó, Sevim B. Bianchi, Alexander S. Hatoum, Elizabeth G. Atkinson, Paola Giusti-Rodriguez, Janitza L. Montalvo-Ortiz, Joel Gelernter, María Soler Artigas, Stella Aslibekyan, Adam Auton, Elizabeth Babalola, Robert K. Bell, Jessica Bielenberg, Katarzyna Bryc, Emily Bullis, Daniella Coker, Gabriel Cuellar Partida, Devika Dhamija, Sayantan Das, Sarah L. Elson, Nicholas Eriksson, Teresa Filshtein, Alison Fitch, Kipper Fletez-Brant, Pierre Fontanillas, Will Freyman, Julie M. Granka, Karl Heilbron, Alejandro Hernandez, Barry Hicks, David A. Hinds, Ethan M. Jewett, Yunxuan Jiang, Katelyn Kukar, Alan Kwong, Keng-Han Lin, Bianca A. Llamas, Maya Lowe, Jey C. McCreight, Matthew H. McIntyre, Steven J. Micheletti, Meghan E. Moreno, Priyanka Nandakumar, Dominique T. Nguyen, Elizabeth S. Noblin, Jared O’Connell, Aaron A. Petrakovitz, G. David Poznik, Alexandra Reynoso, Morgan Schumacher, Anjali J. Shastri, Janie F. Shelton, Jingchunzi Shi, Suyash Shringarpure, Qiaojuan Jane Su, Susana A. Tat, Christophe Toukam Tchakouté, Vinh Tran, Joyce Y. Tung, Xin Wang, Wei Wang, Catherine H. Weldon, Peter Wilton, Corinna D. Wong, Sarah L. Elson, Howard J. Edenberg, Pierre Fontanillas, Abraham A. Palmer, Sandra Sanchez-Roige. A phenome-wide association and Mendelian randomisation study of alcohol use variants in a diverse cohort comprising over 3 million individuals. eBioMedicine, 2024; 105086 DOI: 10.1016/j.ebiom.2024.105086#Addiction #Genetics

item.title: Come get this tea @colombiancoffeebeanshillsboro or @colombianco...

View on Instagram


Come get this tea @colombiancoffeebeanshillsboro or @colombiancoffeebeanspdx ! We have an amazing selection from @hvtea_company ✨Andrew Smyth, Graeme J. Hankey, Albertino Damasceno, Helle Klingenberg Iversen, Shahram Oveisgharan, Fawaz Alhussain, Peter Langhorne, Dennis Xavier, Patricio Lopez Jaramillo, Aytekin Oguz, Clodagh McDermott, Anna Czlonkowska, Fernando Lanas, Danuta Ryglewicz, Catriona Reddin, Xingyu Wang, Annika Rosengren, Salim Yusuf, Martin O’Donnell. Carbonated Beverage, Fruit Drink, and Water Consumption and Risk of Acute Stroke: the INTERSTROKE Case-Control Study. Journal of Stroke, 2024; DOI: 10.5853/jos.2024.01543#Tea #Healthy #Drinks

item.title: I started reading new scientific research for fun back in 2016 w...
item.description:
View on Instagram


I started reading new scientific research for fun back in 2016 when I found a a particularly interesting study about LSD, the brain, and mental health - and ever since that point I was hooked! lol anyways manage stress like a pro, the more u know ✨ Ke Bo, Thomas E. Kraynak, Mijin Kwon, Michael Sun, Peter J. Gianaros, Tor D. Wager. A systems identification approach using Bayes factors to deconstruct the brain bases of emotion regulation. Nature Neuroscience, 2024; DOI: 10.1038/s41593-024-01605-7#BrainScience #MentalHealth #EmotionalResilience
